mcp.summary: Both raw and official SDK probes time out before initialize response, while server startup is fast and uncontaminated; async stdio reader controls hang on this host while plain blocking stdin works.

browser.summary: Playwright and direct chrome-headless-shell launches fail identically with sandbox_host_linux.cc fatal even with explicit no-sandbox flags.

next_remediation: replace or bypass async stdio on the host verification path
run browser verification on a host or runtime where Chromium launch is permitted
